title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

AI.tldr: 本文利用新开发的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl，对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155进行强透镜分析，基于该团簇中两个多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的观测数据，预测了它们未来的重现时间，并联合时间延迟测量约束哈勃常数H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc。
AI.motivation: 星系团MACS J0138.0-2155是首个被发现宿主两个不同多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的透镜团簇，这为利用时间延迟宇宙学（TDC）精确测量哈勃常数提供了独特机遇。此前已有若干独立透镜模型，但本研究旨在通过新的建模框架进一步提高精度并预测未来超新星重现事件。
AI.method: 基于Gravity.jl这一新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架，利用23个光谱确认的多重像（来自8个背景源，红移范围0.767<z<3.420）构建参考质量模型，该模型在图像平面上的均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。结合SN Encore和SN Requiem的实测时间延迟及其统计不确定性，联合推断H0及其他透镜模型自由参数。
AI.result: 参考模型精确再现观测图像位置。预测SN Encore将在2032年5-9月重现（延迟3177天），SN Requiem将在2027年2-7月重现（延迟3938天）。得到H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc，与先前独立透镜模型结果一致，当前误差主要受时间延迟测量相对不确定性（>10%）支配。
AI.conclusion: M0138被确立为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的优先锚点。SN Requiem即将于2027年重现，为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们呈现了对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155（z=0.336）的强透镜（SL）分析，这是已知首个被发现有两次不同多重成像Ia型超新星（SNe）的透镜星系团：SN Requiem和SN Encore。这两个瞬变现象均位于z=1.949的大质量多重成像红色星系MRG-M0138中。该星系团的投影总质量已通过几个独立的透镜模型（Suyu+26; Pierel+26）进行了研究，这些模型使用了来自8个背景源（0.767<z<3.420）的23个光谱确认的多重图像样本，这些图像来自HST和JWST成像数据以及VLT/MUSE光谱。在这项工作中，我们基于一种新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl开发了一个新的SL模型，利用了相同的SL数据集。我们的参考质量模型精确地再现了观测到的图像位置，图像平面均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。假设H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc，我们预测了高度延迟的SNe对应像的未来重现，发现SN Encore的Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} 天（2032年5月至9月），SN Requiem的Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} 天（2027年2月至7月）。通过允许H0变化，并利用SN Encore和SN Requiem的测量时间延迟及其统计不确定性作为观测量，我们联合推断出H0的值以及其他透镜模型自由参数。从这一分析中，我们得到了H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc的新测量值，与前述独立透镜模型推断的值一致。该误差目前主要由测量时间延迟的大相对不确定性（>10%）主导。SN Requiem即将到来的重现为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。这些结果确立了M0138作为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的首要锚点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : M0138 observed with the JWST. The colour composite is constructed from the following filter combinations: F115W \(+\) F150W in blue, F200W \(+\) F277W in green, and F356W \(+\) F444W in red. The locations of the “gold” multiple-image systems are marked with circles (Ertl et al., 2025 ; Suyu et al., 2026 ) . SN Encore corresponds to System 1, while SN Requiem corresponds to System 2. The foreground (FG) and background (BG) galaxies are indicated by green circles. The three jellyfish galaxies are marked with cyan circles and labelled JF1, JF2, and JF3.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用JWST观测的M0138。彩色合成图像由以下滤光片组合构建：F115W \(+\) F150W（蓝色）、F200W \(+\) F277W（绿色）和F356W \(+\) F444W（红色）。“金色”多重图像系统的位置用圆圈标记（Ertl等人，2025；Suyu等人，2026）。SN Encore对应系统1，SN Requiem对应系统2。前景（FG）和背景（BG）星系用绿色圆圈表示。三个水母星系用青色圆圈标记，并标注为JF1、JF2和JF3。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Calibration of the Faber–Jackson relation for cluster members from Acebron et al. ( 2025 ) . The circles show the measured stellar velocity dispersions of 14 bright cluster galaxies as a function of their total HST F160W magnitude. Points are colour-coded by the average spectral signal-to-noise ratio reported by Granata et al. ( 2025 ) . The reference galaxy used in the scaling relation is the BCG ( \(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) , \(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\) ). The orange line and shaded region show the median \(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\) relation and its \(68\%\) confidence interval derived from the stellar kinematic measurements, following the procedure described in Sect. 3.4.2 . The blue line and shaded region show the corresponding relation predicted by the SL model.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Acebron等人（2025）的星系团成员Faber–Jackson关系校准。圆圈显示了14个明亮星系团星系的测量恒星速度弥散度，作为其总HST F160W星等的函数。点根据Granata等人（2025）报告的平均光谱信噪比进行颜色编码。标度关系中使用的参考星系是BCG（\(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)，\(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\)）。橙色线和阴影区域显示了根据第3.4.2节所述程序，从恒星运动学测量推导出的中位数\(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\)关系及其\(68\%\)置信区间。蓝色线和阴影区域显示了SL模型预测的相应关系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the best-fit SL models for M0138. 4 4 4 Summary of the SL models and their overall performance. The columns report the model name, the number of free parameters explicitly varied in the lens model, \(N_{par}\) , the number of observational constraints, \(N_{const}\) , the number of degrees of freedom, d.o.f., the minimum total chi-square value, \(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\) , the positional contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\) , the time-delay contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\) (where the two terms denote the contributions from SN Encore and SN Requiem, respectively), the minimum chi-square value per degree-of-freedom \(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\) , the \(\Delta_{{rms}}\) value, and the mean Gelman–Rubin convergence statistic, \(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\) , of the MCMC chains. The number of degrees of freedom is computed as \({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\) , where \(N_{src}=8\) is the number of independent source families, each contributing two source-plane coordinates that are marginalised over as nuisance parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：M0138的最佳拟合SL模型总结。4 4 4 SL模型及其整体性能总结。列报告了模型名称、透镜模型中显式变化的自由参数数量\(N_{par}\)、观测约束数量\(N_{const}\)、自由度数量d.o.f.、最小总卡方值\(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的位置贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的时间延迟贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\)（其中两项分别表示来自SN Encore和SN Requiem的贡献）、每自由度最小卡方值\(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\)、\(\Delta_{{rms}}\)值以及MCMC链的平均Gelman–Rubin收敛统计量\(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\)。自由度计算为\({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\)，其中\(N_{src}=8\)是独立源族的数量，每个源族贡献两个作为 nuisance 参数被边缘化的源平面坐标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Positional offsets between the observed and model-predicted multiple images in MACS J0138. The circles mark the observed image positions, while the arrows indicate the direction and magnitude of the offsets toward the corresponding model-predicted positions. For visual clarity, the arrow lengths have been magnified by a factor of ten relative to the true positional offsets. The \((0,0)\) point corresponds to the position of the BCG. The background contours show the total projected mass distribution obtained from the best-fitting lens model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MACS J0138中观测到的和模型预测的多重图像之间的位置偏移。圆圈标记观测到的图像位置，箭头指示朝向相应模型预测位置的偏移方向和大小。为视觉清晰起见，箭头长度相对于真实位置偏移放大了十倍。\((0,0)\)点对应BCG的位置。背景等高线显示了从最佳拟合透镜模型获得的总投影质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison between the observed and model-predicted SB distribution of the multiply imaged host galaxy MRG-M0138. The left panel shows the observed BCG-subtracted JWST F200W image, while the right panel shows the image-plane prediction obtained by lensing the best-fitting Sérsic model of the background source through the reference H0_fixed mass model. The Sérsic source-light parameters were optimised using the pixels associated with the arc hosting multiple image 3c, while the remaining counter-images were predicted a posteriori and were not included in the light-profile optimisation. The two insets on the right show the normalised residuals, clipped to the range \([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\) , for the two regions highlighted by the dashed blue boxes in the model-prediction panel. Residuals associated with host-galaxy images 3d and 3e are omitted because of the contamination from the BCG. Red circles mark the observed multiple images of MRG-M0138 (left panel), listed in Table 4 in Ertl et al. ( 2025 ) , while the red boxes in the right panel correspond to the predicted positions. The blue cross in the right panel shows the predicted position of the host galaxy in the source plane. Coordinates are given in arcseconds relative to the BCG ( \({RA}=24.51570318\) deg, \({Dec}=-21.92547911\) deg).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：观测到的和模型预测的多重成像宿主星系MRG-M0138的面亮度分布比较。左图显示了观测到的BCG减除后的JWST F200W图像，而右图显示了通过将背景源的最佳拟合Sérsic模型通过参考H0_fixed质量模型进行透镜成像得到的图像平面预测。Sérsic源光参数是使用与多重图像3c相关的弧的像素进行优化的，而其余对应像是事后预测的，并未包含在光分布优化中。右图上的两个插图显示了归一化残差，裁剪到范围\([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\)，对应于模型预测面板中虚线蓝色框突出的两个区域。由于BCG的污染，省略了与宿主星系图像3d和3e相关的残差。红色圆圈标记了MRG-M0138的观测多重图像（左图），列于Ertl等人（2025）的表4中，而右图中的红色方框对应于预测位置。右图中的蓝色十字显示了宿主星系在源平面中的预测位置。坐标以相对于BCG的角秒给出（\({RA}=24.51570318\)度，\({Dec}=-21.92547911\)度）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Predicted time delays and magnifications of multiple images of SN Encore and SN Requiem ( H0_fixed mass model). 5 5 5 Values are reported as the median from the \(1000\) sampled chains, with uncertainties corresponding to the \(16\) th and \(84\) th percentiles. Images marked with * are model-predicted images that have not been detected to date, either because of their faintness, as for image 1c, or because of their long predicted time delays, as for images 1d, 1e, 2d, and 2e. Image 1e of SN Encore and image 2e of SN Requiem, marked with † , are predicted in \(47\%\) and \(34\%\) of the posterior samples, respectively; all other images are predicted in all samples. The reference anchor epoch \(t=0\) is set to 2016-07-18 for image 2a of SN Requiem (Rodney et al., 2021 ) , and to 2023-11-17 for image 1a of SN Encore (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SN Encore和SN Requiem多重图像的预测时间延迟和放大率（H0_fixed质量模型）。5 5 5 值报告为来自\(1000\)个采样链的中位数，不确定性对应于\(16\)和\(84\)百分位数。标有*的图像是迄今为止尚未检测到的模型预测图像，要么是因为它们的光度暗淡（如图像1c），要么是因为它们预测的时间延迟较长（如图像1d、1e、2d和2e）。SN Encore的图像1e和SN Requiem的图像2e（标有†）分别在后验样本的\(47\%\)和\(34\%\)中被预测；所有其他图像在所有样本中都被预测。参考锚点历元\(t=0\)对于SN Requiem的图像2a设置为2016-07-18（Rodney等人，2021），对于SN Encore的图像1a设置为2023-11-17（Pierel等人，2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Predicted reappearance time of image 2d of SN Requiem, expressed as the time delay relative to image 2a, \(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\) . The blue point shows the prediction from the Gravity.jl model presented in this work, while the other points show the predictions from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Horizontal error bars indicate the corresponding \(68\%\) credible intervals. For our model, the interval is derived from \(1000\) posterior samples randomly drawn from the H0_fixed MCMC chains.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：SN Requiem图像2d的预测重现时间，表示为相对于图像2a的时间延迟\(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\)。蓝色点显示了本文提出的Gravity.jl模型的预测，而其他点显示了Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型的预测。水平误差条表示相应的\(68\%\)置信区间。对于我们的模型，该区间是从H0_fixed MCMC链中随机抽取的\(1000\)个后验样本推导出的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Comparison of the predicted positions of the multiple images of SN Encore from the Gravity.jl model with those obtained from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Each panel shows one image of SN Encore: the observed images 1a and 1b, and the model-predicted images 1c and 1d. Different symbols and colours correspond to different lens models, as indicated in the legend. The Gravity.jl predictions are shown in blue. The shaded bands show the projected uncertainty region associated with the Gravity.jl prediction. Grey circles denote the observed measured values (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自Gravity.jl模型的SN Encore多重图像预测位置与Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型获得的预测位置的比较。每个面板显示SN Encore的一个图像：观测图像1a和1b，以及模型预测图像1c和1d。不同的符号和颜色对应不同的透镜模型，如图例所示。Gravity.jl预测以蓝色显示。阴影带显示了与Gravity.jl预测相关的投影不确定性区域。灰色圆圈表示观测到的测量值（Pierel等人，2024）。

title: Cosmological Galaxy Formation Modelling in the Era of the Square Kilometre Array
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII(AASKAII),2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Lagos01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Over the past decade, galaxy formation simulations have advanced dramatically, transforming our ability to model the interstellar medium (ISM) and predict galaxies' radio emission. Yet the challenge of bridging physical scales--from sub-parsec star formation to gigaparsec cosmic structure--remains. The Square Kilometre Array (SKA) will map the cold gas and radio continuum of galaxies across cosmic time, demanding models that couple physical realism with cosmological reach. This chapter reviews the state-of-the-art in cosmological galaxy formation modelling in preparation for the SKA. We outline progress in simulating atomic hydrogen (HI), molecular gas, and radio continuum emission from both star formation and active galactic nuclei, highlighting how cosmological hydrodynamical simulations and semi-analytic models now jointly reproduce many observed gas properties. We emphasise the need for a coordinated, ``wedding-cake'' strategy that unites simulations of different scales, for forward modelling of observables to ensure fair comparison with data, and for the integration of new technologies such as AI-driven emulators to accelerate progress. Together, these efforts will enable theoretical models to both interpret and guide SKA science, turning simulations from passive interpreters into active engines for discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了为迎接SKA时代，宇宙学星系形成模拟的最新进展，强调了跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI驱动模拟器的重要性，旨在将模拟从被动解释转变为主动发现引擎。
AI.motivation: SKA将绘制宇宙时标上的冷气体和射电连续谱，需要能够将物理真实性与宇宙学尺度结合的理论模型，以解释和指导SKA科学。
AI.method: 采用“婚礼蛋糕”策略，整合不同尺度的宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型，并通过正向建模和AI仿真器加速进展。
AI.result: 宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型已能联合再现许多观测到的气体性质，包括中性氢（HI）、分子气体以及来自恒星形成和活动星系核的射电连续谱发射。
AI.conclusion: 通过协调跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI技术，理论模型将从被动的解释工具转变为主动的发现引擎，支撑SKA的科学目标。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，星系形成模拟取得了显著进展，极大地提升了我们对星际介质（ISM）进行建模以及预测星系射电辐射的能力。然而，连接不同物理尺度——从亚秒差距的恒星形成到吉秒差距的宇宙结构——的挑战依然存在。平方公里阵列（SKA）将绘制宇宙时间尺度上星系的冷气体和射电连续谱，这要求模型能够将物理真实性与宇宙学尺度相结合。本章回顾了为准备SKA而进行的宇宙学星系形成建模的最新进展。我们概述了在模拟原子氢（HI）、分子气体以及来自恒星形成和活动星系核的射电连续谱辐射方面取得的进展，强调了宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型现在如何共同再现许多观测到的气体性质。我们强调需要一种协调的“千层蛋糕”策略，该策略联合不同尺度的模拟，对可观测物理量进行正向建模以确保与数据的公平比较，并整合如人工智能驱动的仿真器等新技术以加速进展。这些共同努力将使理论模型能够解释和指导SKA的科学目标，将模拟从被动的解释者转变为主动的发现引擎。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：通过协调跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI技术，理论模型将从被动的解释工具转变为主动的发现引擎，支撑SKA的科学目标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Modified from Crain and van de Voort ( 2023 ) to show the processes that are happening at different scales and place them into the context of what is directly simulated and what is modelled via so called “subgrid physics models”. The exact transition of when one goes from directly simulating to modelling depends on the tools at hand. The arrows at the top show the regions that are typically directly simulated in different techniques based on the latest models and simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：修改自Crain and van de Voort (2023)，展示了在不同尺度上发生的过程，并将它们置于直接模拟的内容和通过所谓的“子网格物理模型”建模的内容的背景下。从直接模拟过渡到建模的确切点取决于可用的工具。顶部的箭头显示了基于最新模型和模拟的不同技术中通常直接模拟的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The distribution of gas particles or cells in the temperature vs density plane at \(z=0\) in three different cosmological hydrodynamical simulations. Eagle (left panel) (Crain et al. , 2017 ) lacked an explicit model of the ISM and instead imposed an equation of state. Here, pixels are coloured by the mass fraction, showing that most of the gas mass in the \(z=0\) universe is in the form of hot, low-density gas. FIREbox (middle panel) (Feldmann et al. , 2023 ) uses cooling tables to allow the gas to cool down to \(10\) K and account for the HII, HI, H 2 partition in post-processing. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (red), HI (green) and H 2 (blue) mass. Colibre (right panel) (Schaye et al. , 2026 ) includes explicit on-the-fly non-equilibrium chemistry and cooling that explicitly tracks the HII, HI and H 2 species. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (blue), HI (red) and H 2 (green) mass. The middle and right panel are examples of the recent progress in the field.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在三种不同的宇宙学流体动力学模拟中，\(z=0\) 时气体粒子或单元在温度-密度平面上的分布。Eagle（左图）(Crain et al., 2017) 缺乏明确的ISM模型，而是施加了一个状态方程。此处，像素按质量分数着色，显示 \(z=0\) 宇宙中大部分气体质量以热、低密度气体的形式存在。FIREbox（中图）(Feldmann et al., 2023) 使用冷却表使气体冷却到 \(10\) K，并在后处理中考虑HII、HI、H\(_2\) 的分配。此处，像素按HII（红色）、HI（绿色）和H\(_2\)（蓝色）质量分数着色。Colibre（右图）(Schaye et al., 2026) 包含明确的即时非平衡化学和冷却，明确追踪HII、HI和H\(_2\) 物种。此处，像素按HII（蓝色）、HI（红色）和H\(_2\)（绿色）质量分数着色。中图和右图是该领域近期进展的例子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left panels: Joint distribution of HI column density ( \(N_{{HI}}\) ) and velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma\) ). Pairs of values are drawn from corresponding pixels in the \(0^{{th}}\) and \(2^{{nd}}\) moment maps of high- ( \(\sim 25^{\) ; top row – HR) and low-resolution ( \(\sim 65^{\) ; bottom row – LR) spectral cubes obtained with MeerKAT (left column) for a sample of \(5\) \({L}_{\star}\) galaxies. The centre and right columns show the same measurement for samples of galaxies of similar mass drawn from the TNG50 and FIRE-2 simulation suites, respectively. Simulated galaxies have been ‘observed’ at the same resolution and sensitivity as the corresponding MeerKAT observations. These simulations have much more gas at low column density ( \(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ) at higher column ( \(N_{{HI}}>10^{19}\,{cm}^{-2}\) ) that is also not observed. (Reproduced from Fig. 5 in Marasco et al. , 2025 .) Right panel: Cumulative HI flux as a function of projected distance for MeerKAT galaxies, compared with selected TNG50 and FIRE-2 galaxies (Reproduced from Fig. 7 in Marasco et al. 2025 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：HI柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}}\)) 和速度弥散度 (\(\sigma\)) 的联合分布。数值对取自使用MeerKAT（左列）对 \(5\) 个 \({L}_{\star}\) 星系样本进行高分辨率（\(\sim 25^{\)；上行 – HR）和低分辨率（\(\sim 65^{\)；下行 – LR）光谱立方体的 \(0^{{th}}\) 和 \(2^{{nd}}\) 矩图中的对应像素。中列和右列分别显示了从TNG50和FIRE-2模拟套件中抽取的相似质量星系样本的相同测量结果。模拟星系已在与相应MeerKAT观测相同的分辨率和灵敏度下被“观测”。这些模拟在低柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)) 处有更多气体，这也是未观测到的。（复制自Marasco et al., 2025 的图5。）右图：MeerKAT星系的累积HI通量作为投影距离的函数，与选定的TNG50和FIRE-2星系进行比较（复制自Marasco et al. 2025 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: A compilation of observed galaxies collected by Santos-Santos et al. ( 2020 ) in the space of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) . The \(\eta_{{rot}}\) parameter is the ratio of the rotation curve amplitude at a suitably chosen ‘inner’ radius ( \(V_{{fid}}\) ) and its maximum ( \(V_{{max}}\) ), and serves as a proxy for the rotation curve shape: a higher (lower) value of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) is suggestive of a dark matter cusp (core). The horizontal grey line marks the expectation for an NFW halo model. The \(\eta_{{bar}}\) parameter is a measure of the influence of the baryonic (stellar & gas) components of the galaxy on its kinematics within the same inner aperture. Higher \(\eta_{{bar}}\) values correspond to more centrally baryon-dominated galaxies. Points are coloured by \(V_{{max}}\) . For low mass galaxies ( \(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ;black-orange points) an anti-correlation with substantial scatter between \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) emerges. This trend is challenging to explain and provides a stringent test of theories proposed to resolve the cusp-core discrepancy. (Reproduced from Fig. 4 in Santos-Santos et al. , 2020 .)
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Santos-Santos et al. (2020) 收集的观测星系在 \(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 空间中的汇编。\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 参数是在适当选择的“内部”半径 (\(V_{{fid}}\)) 处的旋转曲线幅度与其最大值 (\(V_{{max}}\)) 的比值，并作为旋转曲线形状的代理：\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 的较高（较低）值暗示暗物质尖点（核）。水平灰线标记了NFW晕模型的预期值。\(\eta_{{bar}}\) 参数是星系的重子（恒星和气体）成分在同一内部孔径内对其动力学影响的度量。较高的 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 值对应于更中心重子主导的星系。点按 \(V_{{max}}\) 着色。对于低质量星系 (\(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)；黑-橙色点)，\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 之间出现了具有显著离散度的反相关。这一趋势难以解释，并为旨在解决尖点-核差异的理论提供了严格的检验。（复制自Santos-Santos et al., 2020 的图4。）

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The HI velocity width function is a strong constraint on the halo mass function of gas rich galaxies and therefore a potential test of cosmological models, but faithfully modelling the galaxy distribution in HI mass ( \(M_{{HI}}\) ) and line width ( \(w_{50}\) ) requires capturing the complexity of cold gas dynamics. A detailed forward model of the spectra of galaxies in the GALFORM semi-analytic model (green line, adapted from fig. 4 in Brooks et al. , 2023 ) greatly overpredicts (underpredicts) the number counts of low- \(w_{{50}}\) (high- \(w_{50}\) ) galaxies in the ALFALFA survey (open crosses; Haynes et al. , 2018 ) . However, a similar forward modelling applied to a different semi-analytic model ( Shark ; Chauhan et al. 2019 , shown for two \(N\) -body boxes medi and micro, representing lower and higher resolution, respectively) is in much better agreement with the data, showing how sensitive this is to the underlying baryon physics. Hydrodynamical models like Eagle (purple line, reproduced from ‘EAGLE25’ curve in fig. 4 of Oman et al. , 2024 ) capture the non-linear relationship between halo mass and \(w_{50}\) – and especially its scatter – arguably more accurately (see fig. 7 in Oman et al. , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HI速度宽度函数是对富气星系晕质量函数的强约束，因此是宇宙学模型的潜在检验，但忠实地模拟HI质量 (\(M_{{HI}}\)) 和谱线宽度 (\(w_{50}\)) 中的星系分布需要捕捉冷气体动力学的复杂性。GALFORM半解析模型中星系光谱的详细正向模型（绿线，改编自Brooks et al., 2023 的图4）极大地高估（低估）了ALFALFA巡天（开放十字；Haynes et al., 2018）中低 \(w_{{50}}\) （高 \(w_{50}\) ）星系的计数。然而，应用于不同半解析模型（Shark；Chauhan et al. 2019，显示为两个 \(N\) 体盒子medi和micro，分别代表较低和较高分辨率）的类似正向建模与数据吻合得更好，这表明这对底层重子物理非常敏感。像Eagle（紫色线，复制自Oman et al., 2024 图4中的‘EAGLE25’曲线）这样的流体动力学模型捕捉了晕质量与 \(w_{50}\) 之间的非线性关系——尤其是其离散度——可以说更准确（见Oman et al., 2024 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Taken from Figures 4 and 7 in Gensior et al. ( 2024 ) . The maps on the left show face-on projection of the HI surface density for four example galaxies in the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency (top) and an efficiency that depends on the turbulence of the ISM (bottom). The plot on the right shows radial profiles of the HI disc scale heights of the simulated galaxies, showing that the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency produces HI discs that are substantially thicker than those observed in the nearby universe (black symbols with errorbars).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：取自Gensior et al. (2024) 的图4和图7。左侧的图显示了EMP-Pathfinder模拟中四个示例星系采用恒定恒星形成效率（上）和依赖于ISM湍流的效率（下）时的HI面密度正面投影。右侧的图显示了模拟星系HI盘标高（disc scale heights）的径向轮廓，表明采用恒定恒星形成效率的EMP-Pathfinder模拟产生的HI盘明显比近邻宇宙中观测到的（带误差棒的黑点）更厚。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Figure 1 in Stevens et al. ( 2019b ) , showing the projected HI column density of a galaxy cluster of mass \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) in TNG at \(z=0\) . Circles indicate the equivalent physical beam size used to measure HI masses considering the xGASS survey (Catinella et al. , 2018 ) . Circles are coloured by the stellar mass of the galaxy they are centred on. The central galaxy of the cluster is indicated by red circle.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：Stevens et al. (2019b) 的图1，显示了TNG中 \(z=0\) 时质量为 \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星系团的投影HI柱密度。圆圈表示考虑xGASS巡天（Catinella et al., 2018）时用于测量HI质量的等效物理波束大小。圆圈按其中心星系的恒星质量着色。星团的中心星系由红色圆圈指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The HI mass function at \(z=0\) (solid lines), \(z=1\) (dashed lines), and \(z=2\) (dotted lines) in \(3\) semi-analytic models ( Shark , GAEA, GALFORM) and \(3\) cosmological hydrodynamical simulations ( Eagle , TNG and Simba), as labelled in each panel. Observations at \(z\approx 0\) from Zwaan et al. ( 2005 ) and Jones et al. ( 2018 ) are shown as grey circles and crosses, respectively; while the inferred HI mass function at \(z\approx 1\) from convolving stacked spectra with measured optical luminosity functions at \(z\approx 1\) (Chowdhury et al. , 2024 ) are shown as a grey band. Eagle and Simba predict the number densities of galaxies to increase with increasing redshift, while the other simulations predict the opposite trend. None of the simulations appear to reproduce the level of increase in number density inferred from the \(z\approx 1\) observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在 \(z=0\) （实线）、\(z=1\) （虚线）和 \(z=2\) （点线）处的HI质量函数，分别来自 \(3\) 个半解析模型（Shark, GAEA, GALFORM）和 \(3\) 个宇宙学流体动力学模拟（Eagle, TNG和Simba），如每个面板中所标注。来自Zwaan et al. (2005) 和Jones et al. (2018) 的 \(z\approx 0\) 观测分别显示为灰色圆圈和十字；而通过将堆叠光谱与 \(z\approx 1\) 处测量的光学光度函数卷积推断出的 \(z\approx 1\) 处HI质量函数（Chowdhury et al., 2024）显示为灰色带。Eagle和Simba预测星系的数密度随红移增加而增加，而其他模拟则预测相反的趋势。没有一个模拟似乎能再现从 \(z\approx 1\) 观测推断出的数密度增加水平。

title: Constraining the Physical Properties of Quadruply Lensed Quasars using Optical-to-X-Ray Data
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Gravitational lensing of luminous active galactic nuclei (AGN; or quasars) can be used as a natural telescope to zoom in on their inner structures. With more and more lensed AGN being discovered, it is extremely important to have a homogeneous study focused on constraining their key physical properties, especially the bolometric luminosity. The primary limitation for such a study is the availability of observations for a representative sample of lensed AGN in at least the optical, ultraviolet (UV), and X-ray bands, where most of the AGN emission is concentrated. In this paper, we present one of the largest multiwavelength studies of lensed AGN with the aim of accurately measuring some of the fundamental quantities, such as their bolometric luminosities, black hole masses, and Eddington ratios. We compiled photometric and spectroscopic data in optical/UV and X-rays, for 27 quadruply lensed AGN ($0.6 < z < 3.1$) and calculated their bolometric luminosities by fitting their broadband spectral energy distributions (SEDs) with phenomenological models. We also performed spectral emission line fitting to estimate their black hole masses using the virial method. Additionally, we compared different prescriptions to calculate the bolometric luminosities of AGN from limited data, and our results show that the luminosity-dependent 2-10 keV X-ray bolometric corrections provide unbiased and reliable predictions of the bolometric luminosity, with a maximum scatter of $\sim 0.5$ dex. The predictions from optical bolometric corrections are generally overestimated but show a lower scatter once microlensing effects are taken into account. Thanks to the compiled optical/UV and X-ray data for our lensed AGN sample, we also present the well-known UV-X-ray luminosity relation for AGN as a novel way to determine uncertainty in the magnifications of lensed AGN induced by micro- and/or millilensing.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对27个四重引力透镜AGN的多波段数据拟合，精确测量了其光度和黑洞质量，发现基于X射线的修正因子能无偏估计辐射光度，并利用UV-X射线关系为透镜AGN的微引力透镜放大效应不确定性提供了新约束方法。
AI.motivation: 随着透镜AGN数量增加，亟需对这类天体进行均匀的多波段研究以精确测量其基本物理参数（尤其是辐射光度），但此前缺乏代表性样本的光学、紫外和X射线波段观测数据。
AI.method: 收集27个四重透镜AGN（红移0.6-3.1）的光学/紫外和X射线数据，通过拟合宽波段SED计算辐射光度，利用谱线拟合和维里法估算黑洞质量，并比较不同辐射修正方法的可靠性。
AI.result: 依赖光度的2-10 keV X射线辐射修正能提供无偏且可靠的辐射光度预测（弥散约0.5 dex）；光学修正结果普遍偏高，但考虑微引力透镜效应后弥散降低；UV-X射线光度关系可用于约束透镜AGN的微/毫引力透镜放大不确定性。
AI.conclusion: X射线修正是更可靠的AGN辐射光度估计方法，而UV-X射线关系可作为透镜AGN放大倍率不确定性的新诊断工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力透镜效应使明亮的活跃星系核（AGN；或类星体）能够作为天然望远镜，用于放大其内部结构。随着越来越多的透镜AGN被发现，开展一项同质性研究以约束其关键物理性质（尤其是辐射光度）变得极为重要。此类研究的主要限制在于，至少需要在光学、紫外（UV）和X射线波段（AGN辐射主要集中区域）获得具有代表性的透镜AGN样本观测数据。本文呈现了迄今最大规模的透镜AGN多波段研究之一，旨在精确测量其基本物理量，如辐射光度、黑洞质量及爱丁顿比。我们收集了27个四重透镜AGN（$0.6 < z < 3.1$）在光学/紫外和X射线波段的光度与光谱数据，并通过拟合其宽带能谱分布（SEDs）与唯象模型来计算辐射光度。我们还进行了谱线拟合，利用维里法估算其黑洞质量。此外，我们比较了从有限数据计算AGN辐射光度的不同方法，结果表明依赖于光度的2-10 keV X射线辐射修正能提供无偏且可靠的辐射光度预测，最大弥散约为$\sim 0.5$ dex。光学辐射修正的预测通常被高估，但在考虑微引力透镜效应后弥散较低。得益于所编译的透镜AGN样本的光学/紫外和X射线数据，我们还展示了著名的AGN UV-X射线光度关系，作为确定由微透镜和/或毫透镜引起的透镜AGN放大倍率不确定性的新方法。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，X射线修正是更可靠的AGN辐射光度估计方法，而UV-X射线关系可作为透镜AGN放大倍率不确定性的新诊断工具。

title: Euclid Quick Data Release (Q2) -- The Euclid Galactic Bulge Survey
comment: 21 pages, 19 figures, submitted for publication to Astronomy and Astrophysics. (abridged abstract)
summary: The Euclid Quick Data Release Q2 provides an unprecedented deep, wide-field, high-angular-resolution view of the inner Galactic bulge through the Euclid Galactic Bulge Survey (EGBS). Nine contiguous fields covering 4.8 deg$^2$ were observed with the VIS instrument over 24 hours in March 2025. Unlike the nominal Euclid survey strategy, the EGBS employed 16 dithered exposures of 400 s each, corresponding to a total integration time of 1.8 hours per field. Dedicated calibration observations were obtained to derive point spread functions (PSFs). The primary objective of the EGBS is gravitational microlensing, with high-angular-resolution imaging enabling lens-mass measurements to better than 10%. The survey provides an optical reference dataset for previously discovered microlensing events and future observations of the Galactic bulge. The Q2 data were processed with the VIS-PF pipeline. The non-standard observing strategy required dedicated calibration products, while the extreme stellar density necessitated modifications to the astrometric calibration and cosmic-ray detection procedures. These improvements have since been incorporated into later pipeline versions. We describe the motivation, observing strategy, data processing, products, and first results of the EGBS. Astrometric residuals with respect to the Gaia DR3 catalogue are 5.5 mas in right ascension and 4.4 mas in declination across the survey area, while the photometric zero points are calibrated to 1.5%. The Q2 release includes calibrated single-dither images, dedicated PSF models, and photometric catalogues containing approximately 45 million detected sources per dither down to AB magnitude 26. Although incomplete because of extreme crowding, these products provide a robust astrometric and photometric foundation for future exploitation of the dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了欧几里得银河系凸起巡天（EGBS）在Q2快速数据发布中的观测策略、数据处理及初步结果，该巡天利用VIS仪器对银河系内部凸起区域进行了深度、宽场、高角分辨率观测，主要用于引力微透镜研究。
AI.motivation: 主要动机是开展引力微透镜研究，通过高角分辨率成像实现透镜质量测量（精度优于10%），并为已知微透镜事件及未来银河系凸起观测提供光学参考数据集。
AI.method: 采用非标准观测策略，在4.8平方度范围内对9个连续天区进行16次抖动曝光（每次400秒，单天区总积分1.8小时）；使用VIS-PF管道处理数据，针对极端恒星密度改进了天体测量校准和宇宙射线检测程序，并获取专用校准观测以推导点扩散函数。
AI.result: 天体测量残差相对于Gaia DR3为5.5 mas（赤经）和4.4 mas（赤纬）；测光零点校准精度达1.5%；每次抖动可检测约4500万个源（AB星等26等）；发布了校准单抖动图像、专用PSF模型和测光星表。
AI.conclusion: 尽管因极端拥挤而存在不完整性，但Q2发布的产品为数据集未来利用提供了稳健的天体测量和测光基础，相关改进已纳入后续管道版本。

title: JWST resolves jet-driven H2 and ionized outflows in radio galaxy 3C305
summary: We present JWST MIRI MRS, NIRSpec, NIRCam, and MIRI imaging observations of 3C 305, a radio galaxy with a compact jet that is confined within the galaxy. We use the H2 0-0 S(1)-S(7) lines, several mid-IR fine-structure lines, and PAH emission in the MIRI MRS spectrum to conduct a multiphase study of the radio jet's impact on the interstellar medium. Multiple tracers, including H2/PAH 11.3 um and [Fe II] 5.34 um, provide evidence for shocks at the jet termination locations. Two Gaussian components are required to reproduce the warm H2 kinematics adequately, with one representing the bulk low-velocity component and the other corresponding to an outflow. The ionized gas reaches higher outflow velocities than the H2 gas, and the sharp increase in velocity at the jet hotspots points to jet-driven outflows. We fit the H2 excitation diagram with a power-law temperature distribution and find that the hotspots exhibit flatter slopes, indicating a larger warm/hot gas mass fraction at these locations. Our MAPPINGS line-ratio analysis indicates that most of the mid-IR ionized gas can be fit by a shock-plus-precursor model. We find that strong radiative losses dominated by line cooling, together with moderate kinetic power in the molecular and ionized gas outflows, can account for the estimated jet power, indicating high jet coupling efficiency in 3C 305. Together with other studies of multiphase gas, our results show that jets can efficiently shock-heat and accelerate the gas they encounter, driving massive, kiloparsec-scale, multiphase outflows.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST多波段数据，对射电星系3C 305中受限喷流与星际介质的相互作用进行多相研究，发现喷流在终止处产生激波，驱动大规模多相外流，并具有高耦合效率。
AI.motivation: 揭示受限射电喷流如何影响星系星际介质，评估喷流能量向气体传递的效率。
AI.method: 使用JWST MIRI MRS、NIRSpec、NIRCam及MIRI成像数据，分析H2转动线、中红外精细结构线和PAH发射，结合高斯分解、激发图拟合和MAPPINGS激波模型。
AI.result: 喷流终止处存在激波证据；电离气体外流速度高于H2气体；热点处H2激发图斜率更平缓，暖/热气体质量占比更高；大部分中红外电离气体可用激波加前体模型拟合。
AI.conclusion: 喷流可高效冲击加热和加速星际介质，驱动千秒差距尺度的大规模多相外流，且辐射冷却是主要的能量损失机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了3C 305的JWST MIRI MRS、NIRSpec、NIRCam和MIRI成像观测结果，3C 305是一个射电星系，其致密喷流被限制在星系内部。我们利用MIRI MRS光谱中的H2 0-0 S(1)-S(7)谱线、若干中红外精细结构谱线和PAH发射，对射电喷流对星际介质的影响进行了多相研究。包括H2/PAH 11.3 um和[Fe II] 5.34 um在内的多种示踪物，为喷流终止位置存在激波提供了证据。需要两个高斯分量才能充分再现暖H2的运动学特征，其中一个代表主体低速分量，另一个对应于外流。电离气体达到比H2气体更高的外流速度，喷流热点处速度的急剧增加指向喷流驱动的外流。我们用幂律温度分布拟合H2激发图，发现热点表现出更平坦的斜率，表明这些位置存在更大的暖/热气体质量分数。我们的MAPPINGS线比分析表明，大部分中电离气体可以用激波加前驱体模型拟合。我们发现，以线冷却为主的强辐射损失，加上分子和电离气体外流中适中的动能功率，可以解释估算的喷流功率，表明3C 305中喷流耦合效率很高。结合其他多相气体的研究，我们的结果表明，喷流可以有效地冲击加热和加速其遇到的星际介质，驱动大规模的千秒差距尺度多相外流。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：喷流可高效冲击加热和加速星际介质，驱动千秒差距尺度的大规模多相外流，且辐射冷却是主要的能量损失机制。

Extended Pa \(\alpha\) emission traces ionized gas in filamentary structures along the jet axis. Bottom Left: MIRI F770W, F1280W, and F1000W (r, g, b), highlighting PAH 7.7 \(\mu m\) , PAH 11.3 \(\mu m\) , and dust continuum emission with a visible contribution from H 2 and ionized gas lines. The dashed box outlines the extent of the other three panels in this figure. Bottom Right: Continuum-subtracted PAH 3.3 \(\mu\) m map derived from NIRCam F335W – 0.78 F277W. The spatial distribution of PAH emission is similar to the dust lanes. AGN hot-dust continuum emission is apparent in the galaxy core. All the images are oriented with north up and east to the left.

Prominent H 2 rovibrational and pure rotational lines mark emission from shock-heated warm molecular gas. High-ionization potential (coronal) lines such as [Mg VIII] and [Si IX] are likely photoionized by the AGN. CO absorption bands in the stellar continuum are apparent at 2.3-2.5 \(\mu\) m.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：核心的NIRSpec光谱。标出了强发射线和PAH 3.3 \(\mu\) m特征。突出的H2振转和纯转动谱线标记了来自激波加热的暖分子气体的发射。高电离势（冕）线，如[Mg VIII]和[Si IX]，很可能被AGN光电离。在2.3-2.5 \(\mu\) m处可见恒星连续谱中的CO吸收带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Context: Multi-phase gas distribution compiled from archival and current JWST data. Top row: (left) rgb color composite of HST NIR (F160W), optical V (F555W), and optical R (F702W) bands showing prominent dust lanes, (middle) NOEMA CO (1-0) gas tracing cold molecular gas shown as a moment-0 map with a synthesized beam of 1.5 ′′ × 0.9 ′′ at PA \(\approx\) 12 ∘ (Morganti et al. , 2023 ) , (right) JWST/MIRI F1130W image tracing the PAH 11.3 µm feature (similar to PAH 3.3 \(\mu\) m in Figure 1 ). Bottom row: (left) hot X-ray emitting plasma emission (0.5–7 keV) from Chandra /ACIS, (Massaro et al. , 2009 ; Hardcastle et al. , 2012 ) , (middle) HST/WFPC2 narrowband image (F521N) centered at [O III ] \(\lambda\) 5007 emission tracing warm ionized gas, and (right) near-UV (NUV) continuum emission using HST/STIS NUV-MAMA. X-band radio contours are overlaid in all panels to highlight the jet morphology. Contour levels are \([0.8,\,1.2,\,5.7,\,50]\times 10^{-4}~{Jy}\) . The marked dust lane may obscure some of the X-ray, [O III ], and NUV emission in the southwest.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：背景：由存档数据和当前JWST数据汇编的多相气体分布。顶行：（左）HST近红外（F160W）、光学V（F555W）和光学R（F702W）波段的RGB彩色合成图像，显示了显著的尘埃带；（中）NOEMA CO (1-0)气体示踪冷分子气体，显示为矩0图，合成波束为1.5 ′′ × 0.9 ′′，位置角PA \(\approx\) 12 ∘ (Morganti et al. , 2023) ；（右）JWST/MIRI F1130W图像示踪PAH 11.3 µm特征（类似于图1中的PAH 3.3 \(\mu\) m）。底行：（左）来自Chandra /ACIS的热X射线发射等离子体发射（0.5–7 keV）(Massaro et al. , 2009 ; Hardcastle et al. , 2012) ；（中）HST/WFPC2窄带图像（F521N）中心位于[O III ] \(\lambda\) 5007发射，示踪暖电离气体；（右）使用HST/STIS NUV-MAMA的近紫外（NUV）连续谱发射。所有面板均叠加了X波段射电等高线以突出喷流形态。等高线水平为\([0.8,\,1.2,\,5.7,\,50]\times 10^{-4}~{Jy}\) 。标记的尘埃带可能遮挡了西南方向的部分X射线、[O III ]和NUV发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Map of \(\Delta{BIC}_{21}\equiv{BIC}_{2}-{BIC}_{1}\) for the H 2 S(1) emission line. Negative values indicate a statistical preference for the two-component model. Radio continuum contours are overlaid. Shaded regions mark spaxels where the two-component model is adopted ( \(\Delta{BIC}_{21}<0\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：H2 S(1)发射线的\(\Delta{BIC}_{21}\equiv{BIC}_{2}-{BIC}_{1}\) 图。负值表示统计上倾向于双分量模型。叠加了射电连续谱等高线。阴影区域标记了采用双分量模型（\(\Delta{BIC}_{21}<0\) ）的空间像素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top left: H 2 S(2) moment 0 map showing spatial distribution of warm molecular gas (color bar in MJy \(\mu\) m -1 sr -1 ). Top right: H 2 S(3)/H 2 S(1) is a tracer of H 2 temperature. The region beyond the NE radio hotspot exhibits the highest temperatures, whereas the AGN core and NE and SW radio hotspots also show relatively high temperatures, consistent with shock heating by the radio jet. There is tentative evidence for elevated temperature in the direction transverse to the radio jet. Bottom left: The PAH 11.3 \(\mu\) m map (color bar in MJy \(\mu\) m -1 sr -1 ) has a similar overall spatial distribution to H 2 , showing it is associated with the dusty molecular disk. Emission peaks near the center, where the ambient UV field from the bulge is most intense. The apparent central divot is an instrumental artifact. Bottom right: The H 2 S(3)/PAH 11.3 shock indicator, similar to the H 2 S(3)/S(1) ratio, peaks just outside of the radio hotspots.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左上：H2 S(2)矩0图，显示暖分子气体的空间分布（色标单位为MJy \(\mu\) m -1 sr -1 ）。右上：H2 S(3)/H2 S(1)是H2温度的示踪物。东北射电热点以外的区域显示出最高温度，而AGN核心以及东北和西南射电热点也显示出相对较高的温度，这与射电喷流的激波加热一致。有初步证据表明在垂直于射电喷流的方向上温度升高。左下：PAH 11.3 \(\mu\) m图（色标单位为MJy \(\mu\) m -1 sr -1 ）与H2的整体空间分布相似，表明它与尘埃分子盘相关。发射在中心附近达到峰值，那里来自核球的周围紫外场最强。中心明显的凹陷是仪器伪影。右下：H2 S(3)/PAH 11.3激波指示因子，与H2 S(3)/S(1)比值相似，在射电热点外侧达到峰值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Position–velocity diagrams for molecular and ionized gas in 3C 305. Top row: H 2 0–0 S(1). Bottom row: [Ne iii ]. Left column: Extraction line aligned with the galaxy major axis. A disk rotation curve, assuming an arctan model, is overlaid on the PV diagram. Right column: Extraction line aligned with the radio jet axis. The locations of the hotspots are marked as HS1 and HS2. The CO(1-0) PV diagram derived from the CO cube (Morganti et al. , 2023 ) is shown as the green dashed contours in the top-left panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：3C 305中分子和电离气体的位置-速度图。顶行：H2 0–0 S(1)。底行：[Ne iii ]。左列：提取线沿星系主轴对齐。在PV图上叠加了假设arctan模型的盘旋转曲线。右列：提取线沿射电喷流轴对齐。热点位置标记为HS1和HS2。左上面板中绿色虚线等高线显示了从CO数据立方体导出的CO(1-0) PV图 (Morganti et al. , 2023) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The figure shows the double-Gaussian fitting of H 2 S(2) emission lines at the marked spaxel locations. The arrows starting from the central moment-0 image show the location of the spaxels from where the corresponding spectra were extracted. Most spaxels require at least two Gaussian components, a broad and a narrow component to satisfactorily reproduce the spectral shape. More interestingly, the narrow emission lines in the north-eastern region seem to be systematically outflowing, suggesting potential jet-driven feedback. The bottom middle panel shows the moment-2 map of the H 2 S(2) emission line. It displays larger-than-expected velocity dispersion values, especially in the central region, with a median value of \(\sim 150\ {km\ s^{-1}}\) . This motivated the use of multi-component Gaussian analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：该图显示了在标记的空间像素位置对H2 S(2)发射线进行的双高斯拟合。从中心矩0图像开始的箭头显示了提取相应光谱的空间像素的位置。大多数空间像素需要至少两个高斯分量，一个宽分量和一个窄分量，才能令人满意地再现光谱形状。更有趣的是，东北区域的窄发射线似乎系统地向外流，表明存在潜在的喷流反馈。底部中间面板显示了H2 S(2)发射线的矩2图。它显示出比预期更大的速度弥散值，尤其是在中心区域，中位值为\(\sim 150\ {km\ s^{-1}}\) 。这促使我们使用多分量高斯分析。

title: Tracing the Star Formation History of the Universe through Thermal Free-Free Emission with the SKA
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/Algera01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: One of the major scientific aims of the SKA is to trace the history of star formation across cosmic time. High-frequency radio surveys are indispensable in this regard, as these are capable of probing thermal free-free emission (FFE) -- the dominant component of the radio continuum of star-forming galaxies above rest-frame frequencies of $\gtrsim25\,$GHz. FFE is a powerful, direct star-formation rate (SFR) indicator, which robustly traces the number of ionizing photons produced by recently formed massive stars in a nearly dust-unbiased manner. In this chapter, we forecast the ability of the SKA to detect FFE in typical star-forming galaxies in the early Universe. Our starting point is the state-of-the-art T-RECS simulation suite of the faint radio sky, to which we apply an ambitious, matched-depth, multi-band AA4 SKA-Mid survey in Bands 1 through 5b, covering an area of $0.25\,\mathrm{deg}^2$ across $0.35 - 15.4\,\mathrm{GHz}$. We predict that such a survey will detect $\sim1.5\times10^4$ star-forming galaxies in all bands out to $z\approx7$, and perform simulations using established fitting techniques to investigate the accuracy with which their thermal FFE can be recovered. We find that thermal fractions ($f_\mathrm{th}$) and synchrotron spectral indices can be constrained in an unbiased manner, and predict uncertainties on the thermal SFRs of $\lesssim 0.1\,\mathrm{dex}$ for galaxies at the knee of the radio luminosity function across redshift. Convolving the distribution of $f_\mathrm{th}$ inferred from the multi-band SKA-Mid survey with wider luminosity function determinations at low radio frequencies will yield robust constraints on the total cosmic star formation rate density out to $z\sim7$.

AI.tldr: 本文预测SKA中频巡天（0.25 deg²，0.35-15.4 GHz）可探测到约1.5×10⁴个高红移（z≤7）恒星形成星系，通过热自由-自由发射（FFE）实现无偏的恒星形成率测量，精度优于0.1 dex。
AI.motivation: SKA的重要科学目标之一是追溯宇宙时间尺度上的恒星形成历史，而高频射电巡天能够探测热自由-自由发射（FFE），这是一种几乎无尘埃偏差的恒星形成率直接指示器。当前缺乏对此能力的前瞻性量化评估。
AI.method: 基于T-RECS模拟套件，设计AA4 SKA-Mid多波段（Band 1-5b，0.35-15.4 GHz）匹配深度巡天（0.25 deg²），利用成熟的拟合技术恢复热FFE成分，并与射电光度函数结合估算宇宙恒星形成率密度。
AI.result: 可探测约1.5×10⁴个z≤7的恒星形成星系；热分数和同步辐射谱指数可无偏约束；射电光度函数拐点处星系的恒星形成率测量不确定度≤0.1 dex。
AI.conclusion: 将多波段SKA-Mid巡天推断的热分数分布与低频射电光度函数结合，可获得z~7范围内宇宙总恒星形成率密度的稳健约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: SKA的主要科学目标之一是追踪宇宙时间尺度上的恒星形成历史。高频射电巡天在这方面不可或缺，因为它们能够探测热自由-自由辐射（FFE）——在静止系频率高于约25 GHz时，恒星形成星系射电连续谱的主要成分。FFE是一个强大且直接的恒星形成率（SFR）指示器，它能够以几乎不受尘埃影响的方式稳健地追踪近期形成的大质量恒星所产生的电离光子数量。在本章中，我们预测了SKA在早期宇宙典型恒星形成星系中探测FFE的能力。我们的出发点是基于最先进的微弱射电天空T-RECS模拟套件，并对其应用一个雄心勃勃的、匹配深度的多波段AA4 SKA-Mid巡天，覆盖波段1至5b，面积为0.25平方度，频率范围为0.35至15.4 GHz。我们预测，这样的巡天将在所有波段中探测到约1.5×10^4个恒星形成星系，直至红移z≈7，并使用成熟的拟合技术进行模拟，以研究恢复其热FFE的精度。我们发现，热分数（f_th）和同步加速器谱指数可以无偏地约束，并预测在射电光度函数拐点处的星系，其热SFR的不确定性小于0.1 dex（跨红移范围）。将多波段SKA-Mid巡天推断出的f_th分布与低频射电光度函数的更宽测定结果相结合，将获得对z~7范围内宇宙总恒星形成率密度的稳健约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：将多波段SKA-Mid巡天推断的热分数分布与低频射电光度函数结合，可获得z~7范围内宇宙总恒星形成率密度的稳健约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The typical long-wavelength spectrum of a star-forming galaxy with \({SFR}=100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\) , plotted for a range of redshifts between \(z=2-9\) . The radio component assumes a thermal fraction of \(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})=0.1\) and a synchrotron slope of \(\alpha_{{NT}}=-0.85\) , while dust emission is modeled as a modified blackbody with temperature \(T_{{dust}}=35\,{K}\) and emissivity index \(\beta_{{IR}}=2.0\) . The individual free-free, synchrotron and dust components of the \(z=9\) spectrum (bottom) are indicated through the dash-dotted, dashed and dotted lines, respectively. The nominal frequency coverage of SKA-Mid Bands 1, 2, 5a and 5b is indicated through the vertical shading, and the maroon triangles represent the \(5\sigma\) detection limits for the fiducial SKA-Mid survey outlined in Section 2 , which is set to directly detect highly star-forming galaxies ( \({SFR}\gtrsim 100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\) ) in all bands well beyond Cosmic Noon ( \(z\gtrsim 3\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：一个恒星形成率为\({SFR}=100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\)的典型恒星形成星系的长波谱，绘制了红移范围\(z=2-9\)。射电分量假设热分数\(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})=0.1\)和同步加速器谱指数\(\alpha_{{NT}}=-0.85\)，而尘埃发射建模为修正黑体，温度\(T_{{dust}}=35\,{K}\)和发射率指数\(\beta_{{IR}}=2.0\)。\(z=9\)谱（底部）的各个自由-自由、同步加速器和尘埃分量分别用点划线、虚线和点线表示。SKA-Mid波段1、2、5a和5b的标称频率覆盖范围用垂直阴影表示，栗色三角形代表第2节所述基准SKA-Mid巡天的\(5\sigma\)探测极限，该巡天旨在直接探测所有波段中远超过宇宙正午（\(z\gtrsim 3\)）的高恒星形成率星系（\({SFR}\gtrsim 100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Radio luminosity at the rest-frame frequency probed by SKA-Mid Band 2 ( \(\nu_{{obs}}=1.355\,{GHz}\) ) against redshift for galaxies sampled in the central \(0.25\,{deg}^{2}\) of an SKA-Mid Band 2 pointing with a \(5\sigma=2.0\,\mu{Jy/beam}\) depth. The luminosity limit of the survey is indicated through the dashed black line. Approximately \(1.5\times 10^{4}\) radio sources – the vast majority ( \(\gtrsim 95\%\) ) of which are star-forming galaxies – are expected to be detected above this limit, of which \(\sim 2000\) reside at \(z>3\) and \(\sim 50\) at \(z>6\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：SKA-Mid波段2（\(\nu_{{obs}}=1.355\,{GHz}\)）探测的静止系频率处的射电光度随红移的变化，针对在SKA-Mid波段2指向中心\(0.25\,{deg}^{2}\)区域内采样的星系，深度为\(5\sigma=2.0\,\mu{Jy/beam}\)。巡天的光度极限用黑色虚线表示。预计在此极限之上可探测到约\(1.5\times 10^{4}\)个射电源——其中绝大多数（\(\gtrsim 95\%\)）是恒星形成星系——其中约2000个位于\(z>3\)，约50个位于\(z>6\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The radio spectrum of an example mock \(z\approx 2.5\) galaxy, as will be identified in large numbers in upcoming deep SKA-Mid surveys. The radio spectrum is sampled in Bands 1, 2, 5a and 5b (red datapoints; central observed-frame frequencies are annotated on the top \(x\) -axis) and decomposed into its synchrotron (red) and free-free (blue) components. The black line and grey shading represent the total spectrum and its uncertainty, respectively. The signal-to-noise in the four bands spans \({S/N}=12-26\) , which enables the accurate detection of a flattening spectrum at high frequencies; the signature of thermal free-free emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：一个示例模拟\(z\approx 2.5\)星系的射电谱，此类星系将在即将进行的深SKA-Mid巡天中被大量识别。射电谱在波段1、2、5a和5b中采样（红色数据点；中心观测系频率标注在顶部\(x\)轴上），并分解为其同步加速器（红色）和自由-自由（蓝色）分量。黑线和灰色阴影分别代表总谱及其不确定性。四个波段中的信噪比范围为\({S/N}=12-26\)，这使得能够准确探测高频处的谱变平现象；这是热自由-自由辐射的特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The fitted thermal fractions ( left ) and synchrotron spectral indices ( right ) of our mock radio sources as a function of their input values. Contours are drawn at the \(0.5,1,1.5\) and \(2\sigma\) levels, and individual datapoints are color-coded by \(\alpha_{{NT}}\) ( left ) or \(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})\) ( right ). Three representative errorbars are shown in the bottom right corner of each panel, and correspond to different bins in Band 2 S/N ( \(5-10\sigma\) , \(10-20\sigma\) , and \(20-50\sigma\) ). In both panels, the input and fitted values agree well with one another, suggesting that the radio spectra of star-forming galaxies can be well-recovered in our simulated multi-band SKA-Mid survey. Only a minority population of galaxies with flat synchrotron slopes (dark red points in the left panel) can induce some bias in measurements of the thermal fraction.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：拟合的热分数（左）和同步加速器谱指数（右）随其输入值的变化。等高线绘制在\(0.5,1,1.5\)和\(2\sigma\)水平，单个数据点按\(\alpha_{{NT}}\)（左）或\(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})\)（右）着色。每个面板右下角显示了三个代表性误差棒，对应波段2 S/N的不同区间（\(5-10\sigma\)、\(10-20\sigma\)和\(20-50\sigma\)）。在两个面板中，输入值与拟合值吻合良好，表明在我们模拟的多波段SKA-Mid巡天中，恒星形成星系的射电谱可以很好地恢复。只有少数具有平坦同步加速器谱指数的星系（左面板中的深红色点）可能对热分数的测量引入一些偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Offset between fitted and input thermal fractions (at 1.4 GHz; \(\Delta f_{{th}}=f_{{th,fit}}-f_{{th,input}}\) ) versus that for the synchrotron slope ( \(\Delta\alpha_{{NT}}\) , defined analogously) across the full population of mock sources. There are no systematic biases in the recovery of either parameter, although a mild anti-correlation is visible.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：拟合与输入热分数（在1.4 GHz处；\(\Delta f_{{th}}=f_{{th,fit}}-f_{{th,input}}\)）的偏移相对于同步加速器谱指数偏移（\(\Delta\alpha_{{NT}}\)，类似定义）的关系，针对整个模拟源群体。两个参数的恢复均无系统性偏差，但可见轻微的反相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The accuracy with which the thermal fractions ( left ) and synchrotron spectral indices ( right ) can be recovered, as a function of the Band 2 signal-to-noise ratio. Contours and points are as in Figure 4 . Deep SKA-Mid surveys will not be systematically biased in their measurements of thermal free-free emission even at low S/N, although uncertainties will be significant in this regime. This is mainly due to the degeneracy between \(f_{{th}}\) and \(\alpha_{{NT}}\) that requires high S/N ( \(\gtrsim 10-20\) ) or observations in additional bands to break. The accuracy with which the synchrotron slope can be recovered is a strong function of Band 2 S/N, as expected, but similarly does not show any systematic biases at low signal-to-noise.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：热分数（左）和同步加速器谱指数（右）的恢复精度随波段2信噪比的变化。等高线和点与图4相同。深SKA-Mid巡天即使在低S/N下也不会在热自由-自由辐射测量中产生系统性偏差，尽管在此区间不确定性会很大。这主要是由于\(f_{{th}}\)和\(\alpha_{{NT}}\)之间的简并性，需要高S/N（\(\gtrsim 10-20\)）或额外波段的观测来打破。同步加速器谱指数的恢复精度强烈依赖于波段2的S/N，正如预期，但在低信噪比下同样未显示系统性偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The typical \(1\sigma\) uncertainty on the thermal fraction ( left ) and synchrotron spectral index ( right ) as a function of redshift. Three bins of SKA-Mid Band 2 S/N are considered, and only those with \(\geq 5\) sources are plotted. The solid lines represent the median uncertainty on \(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})\) and \(\alpha_{{NT}}\) in a given bin, while the shaded regions represent the \(16-84^{{th}}\) percentile scatter. At a fixed signal-to-noise ratio, thermal fractions can be better constrained at higher redshift, while the accuracy with which the synchrotron slope can be measured decreases slightly towards earlier cosmic times.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：热分数（左）和同步加速器谱指数（右）的典型\(1\sigma\)不确定性随红移的变化。考虑了SKA-Mid波段2 S/N的三个区间，仅绘制了包含\(\geq 5\)个源的区间。实线代表给定区间内\(f_{{th}}(1.4\,{GHz})\)和\(\alpha_{{NT}}\)的中位不确定性，阴影区域代表\(16-84^{{th}}\)百分位散布。在固定信噪比下，热分数在较高红移处能得到更好的约束，而同步加速器谱指数的测量精度随宇宙时间回溯略有下降。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Binned rest-frame \(1.4\,{GHz}\) radio luminosity versus redshift for our mock SKA-Mid survey. The bins are color-coded by their mean free-free S/N. The thick dashed line corresponds to the approximate sensitivity limit, based on the \(5\sigma\) SKA-Mid Band 2 detection threshold of \(2\,\mu{Jy/beam}\) and a fixed \(\alpha=-0.70\) . The thin line represents sources that are \(4\times\) brighter than this limit (i.e., detected at the \(\sim 20\sigma\) level). The maroon shading corresponds to the knee of the luminosity function \(L_{\star}\) determined by Cochrane et al. ( 2023 ) at \(150\,{MHz}\) and scaled to \(1.4\,{GHz}\) with \(\alpha=-0.7\) . Free-free emission in galaxies at the knee can be readily detected (at \(>5-10\sigma\) ) out to \(z\sim 6\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：我们模拟的SKA-Mid巡天中，分箱的静止系\(1.4\,{GHz}\)射电光度随红移的变化。箱体按其平均自由-自由S/N着色。粗虚线对应近似灵敏度极限，基于\(5\sigma\) SKA-Mid波段2探测阈值\(2\,\mu{Jy/beam}\)和固定\(\alpha=-0.70\)。细线代表比此极限亮\(4\times\)的源（即，在\(\sim 20\sigma\)水平被探测）。栗色阴影对应Cochrane等人（2023）在\(150\,{MHz}\)处确定的光度函数拐点\(L_{\star}\)，并用\(\alpha=-0.7\)缩放至\(1.4\,{GHz}\)。拐点处星系中的自由-自由辐射可以在\(z\sim 6\)之前被轻易探测（在\(>5-10\sigma\)水平）。

title: The new era of Lyman alpha emitters (LAEs): Typical star formation histories of LAEs in the ILLUSTRIS simulation
comment: Proceedings contribution accepted for publication in the proceedings of the Annual Meeting of the Argentine Astronomical Association (AAA 2025),4 pages, 2 figures
summary: This work seeks to understand the nature of Lyman-alpha emitting galaxies in a cosmological context by analyzing their star-formation histories in the IllustrisTNG100 simulation, applying a recent selection criterion. The sample at z = 2.0 includes 6051 Lyman-alpha emitters, classified into four classes (35%, 33%, 21%, and 11%) using KMeans, an unsupervised machine-learning clustering method. The first class reproduces the typical star-formation history, characterized by the most intense star formation at the time of observation. The remaining classes exhibit atypical star-formation histories, with bursts occurring 0.3, 0.7, and 1.3 Gyr before the time of observation. The first class corresponds to galaxies with lower mass, Lyman-alpha luminosity, and total star-formation rate. We conclude that the classical definition of Lyman-alpha emitting galaxies-low mass, low dust content, and a single dominant burst-remains the most representative population (35% of the total sample), although other classes account for the remaining 65% of the cosmological sample.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用IllustrisTNG100模拟和KMeans聚类方法，将z=2.0处的6051个莱曼α发射体分为四类，发现经典定义的单次爆发型仅占35%，其余65%呈现不同的恒星形成历史。
AI.motivation: 在宇宙学背景下理解莱曼α发射星系的本质，特别是其恒星形成历史特征。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG100模拟数据，应用最新选择标准获取样本，采用KMeans无监督机器学习聚类方法将6051个莱曼α发射体分为四类。
AI.result: 四类占比分别为35%、33%、21%和11%。第一类具有典型的恒星形成历史（观测时最强），其余三类分别在观测前0.3、0.7和1.3 Gyr出现爆发。第一类对应较低质量、较低莱曼α光度和总恒星形成率的星系。
AI.conclusion: 经典定义的莱曼α发射星系（低质量、低尘埃、单次主导爆发）仍是最具代表性的群体（占35%），但其余三类合计占65%，表明该星系种群具有更丰富的多样性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本研究旨在通过分析IllustrisTNG100模拟中的恒星形成历史，并应用近期选择标准，从宇宙学角度理解莱曼α发射星系的本质。在红移z=2.0的样本中，包含6051个莱曼α发射体，通过无监督机器学习聚类方法KMeans将其分为四类（占比分别为35%、33%、21%和11%）。第一类再现了典型的恒星形成历史，其特征是在观测时刻恒星形成最为剧烈。其余类别表现出非典型的恒星形成历史，爆发分别发生在观测时刻之前0.3、0.7和1.3 Gyr。第一类对应质量、莱曼α光度和总恒星形成率较低的星系。我们得出结论：莱曼α发射星系的经典定义——低质量、低尘埃含量和单次主导爆发——仍然是最具代表性的群体（占总样本的35%），尽管其他类别占宇宙学样本的其余65%。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，经典定义的莱曼α发射星系（低质量、低尘埃、单次主导爆发）仍是最具代表性的群体（占35%），但其余三类合计占65%，表明该星系种群具有更丰富的多样性。

title: The evolution of the galaxy gas-phase mass-metallicity relation from $z=15$ to $z=0$ in the COLIBRE cosmological simulations
comment: 26 pages, 17 figures, submitted to MNRAS. To access the data underlying all the plots in the paper, visit https://github.com/psharda/colibre_mzr_sharda26
summary: We present the evolution of the galaxy gas-phase mass-metallicity relation (MZR) from $z=15$ to $z=0$ in the COLIBRE cosmological hydrodynamical simulations. Amongst other novel features, COLIBRE follows the multiphase interstellar medium with gas allowed to cool to $\sim 10\,\mathrm{K}$, and includes a new chemistry model in which hydrogen and helium are tracked in non-equilibrium, metals are allowed to mix and diffuse, and the chemical network is coupled to a self-consistent live dust model. Using fiducial COLIBRE runs spanning particle masses from $10^5\,\mathrm{M_{\odot}}$ to $10^7\,\mathrm{M_{\odot}}$ and box sizes $25 - 400\,\mathrm{cMpc}$, we derive the median, mass-weighted MZRs for star-forming galaxies and compare them with a comprehensive compilation of observational data and other simulations. COLIBRE reproduces the observed MZR across cosmic time, notwithstanding the systematic uncertainties in observational measurements of the gas-phase oxygen abundances. The simulations show excellent numerical convergence and uniquely probe the full stellar mass range sampled by current observations across all redshifts. We find that the MZR is already in place at cosmic dawn ($z \approx 10$), and shows no evolution until $z \approx 5$. The slope of the MZR becomes shallower at low redshifts. The turnover at the high-mass end is largely governed by feedback from active galactic nuclei (AGN), whereas the low-mass end of the MZR sensitively depends on the strength of feedback from core collapse supernovae. Variations in the star formation efficiency or depletion of oxygen on dust grains have a more minor impact on the MZR. We identify key physical processes that shape the MZR across cosmic time and highlight where future observations can further constrain galaxy formation models.

AI.tldr: 本文利用COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟，呈现了从z=15到z=0的星系气态质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）的演化，发现MZR在宇宙黎明时期就已存在，高质端受AGN反馈主导，低质端依赖核坍缩超新星反馈强度。
AI.motivation: 理解星系气态质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）从高红移到当前的完整演化过程，并揭示塑造MZR的关键物理过程。
AI.method: 使用COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟，包含多相星际介质、非平衡化学网络、金属混合扩散及自洽尘埃模型，在不同粒子质量和盒尺寸下运行，推导恒星形成星系的中值质量加权MZR，并与观测和其他模拟比较。
AI.result: COLIBRE模拟成功再现了观测到的MZR随宇宙时间的演化，数值收敛性优秀；MZR在z≈10已存在，直到z≈5无明显演化；低红移时斜率变缓；高质端受AGN反馈主导，低质端依赖超新星反馈强度；恒星形成效率和尘埃耗氧的影响较小。
AI.conclusion: COLIBRE模拟能够较好地重现宇宙时间尺度上的MZR，识别了塑造MZR的关键物理过程，为未来观测约束星系形成模型提供了方向。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为宇宙学模拟中的星系质量-金属丰度关系（MZR），属于星系形成与演化领域，与用户Zotero画像中的星际介质、尘埃等关键词有部分重叠，但未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学等用户核心兴趣。用户画像中核心作者均未出现，且论文方法为纯模拟，与用户偏好的观测研究（尤其是透镜辅助的观测）差异较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟中，从红移z=15到z=0的星系气相质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）的演化。COLIBRE的其他新颖特性包括：追踪多相星际介质，允许气体冷却至约10 K；并包含一个新的化学模型，其中氢和氦在非平衡态下被追踪，金属允许混合和扩散，化学网络与自洽的实时尘埃模型耦合。利用从10^5 M_⊙到10^7 M_⊙的粒子质量和25-400 cMpc的盒子尺寸的标准COLIBRE模拟，我们推导了恒星形成星系的中值、质量加权MZR，并将其与观测数据和其他模拟的综合汇编进行比较。尽管观测测量气相氧丰度存在系统不确定性，COLIBRE仍能重现宇宙时间尺度上的观测MZR。模拟显示出极好的数值收敛性，并独特地探测了所有红移下当前观测所覆盖的完整恒星质量范围。我们发现MZR在宇宙黎明（z≈10）时已经存在，并且在z≈5之前没有显示出演化。MZR的斜率在低红移时变得更平缓。高质量端的转折主要由活动星系核（AGN）的反馈控制，而MZR的低质量端则敏感地依赖于核心坍缩超新星反馈的强度。恒星形成效率或尘埃颗粒上氧的消耗对MZR的影响较小。我们识别了塑造宇宙时间尺度上MZR的关键物理过程，并强调了未来观测可以进一步约束星系形成模型的方向。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，COLIBRE模拟能够较好地重现宇宙时间尺度上的MZR，识别了塑造MZR的关键物理过程，为未来观测约束星系形成模型提供了方向。

title: Impact of Anomalous Microwave Emission (AME) on Radio Spectral Energy Distributions: SKA Observations of Galaxies Near and Far
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/Yoon01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Radio continuum emission powered by the thermal bremsstrahlung process is a clean, dust-free tracer of star formation in galaxies. However, the existence of anomalous microwave emission (AME) that is also prominent in a similar frequency range may challenge the use of thermal radio continuum emission to measure the star formation rates of galaxies. So while the nature of AME and the ISM conditions that lead to strong observable AME are still not well understood, the impact of AME on the radio emission from galaxies needs to be investigated for the SKA, which will be sensitive to large numbers of faint, high-redshift galaxies. In this chapter, we compute the observable flux density of free-free emission and AME and investigate the impact of AME on the galaxy radio spectral energy distribution for given observing frequencies and redshifts. Our conclusion is that (1) significance of AME is determined by the size of the AME region relative to the observing beam and ISM hydrogen column density, (2) thermal free-free emission dominates the radio continuum emission for distant galaxies at $\approx 10$ GHz frequency with negligible contribution from AME, (3) high-angular resolution observation of nearby galaxies resolving individual star forming region may need multi-frequency observations to avoid a potential bias from AME in the measure of star formation rate from single frequency observation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了异常微波辐射（AME）对星系射电连续谱的影响，发现对于遥远星系（~10 GHz），热自由-自由辐射占主导，AME贡献可忽略；但对近邻星系中分辨单个恒星形成区的高角分辨率观测，需多频观测以避免AME对恒星形成率测量的潜在偏差。
AI.motivation: SKA将探测大量暗弱高红移星系，而AME可能干扰利用热射电连续谱测量星系恒星形成率的准确性。由于AME本质及ISM条件尚不明确，需评估AME对星系射电辐射的影响。
AI.method: 计算自由-自由辐射和AME的可观测流量密度，分析不同观测频率和红移下AME对星系射电谱能量分布的影响。
AI.result: 1) AME的显著性取决于其区域大小相对于观测波束和ISM氢柱密度；2) 在~10 GHz频率下，遥远星系的热自由-自由辐射占主导，AME贡献可忽略；3) 近邻星系中分辨单个恒星形成区的高角分辨率观测需多频观测以避免单频观测中AME带来的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 对于遥远星系，AME不会影响热射电连续谱测量恒星形成率的准确性；但对于近邻星系的高分辨观测，需谨慎处理AME的潜在偏差，建议采用多频观测策略。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 由热轫致辐射过程驱动的射电连续谱发射是星系中恒星形成的干净、无尘埃的示踪剂。然而，在类似频率范围内也突出的异常微波发射（AME）的存在可能会挑战使用热射电连续谱发射来测量星系恒星形成率的做法。因此，尽管AME的性质以及导致强可观测AME的ISM条件仍未被很好理解，但对于SKA而言，需要研究AME对星系射电发射的影响，因为SKA将对大量微弱的高红移星系敏感。在本章中，我们计算了自由-自由发射和AME的可观测流量密度，并研究了在给定观测频率和红移下AME对星系射电光谱能量分布的影响。我们的结论是：（1）AME的重要性由AME区域相对于观测波束的大小和ISM氢柱密度决定；（2）对于距离遥远的星系，在约10 GHz频率下，热自由-自由发射主导射电连续谱发射，AME的贡献可忽略；（3）对于解析单个恒星形成区域的近邻星系的高角分辨率观测，可能需要多频观测以避免单频观测中AME对恒星形成率测量带来的潜在偏差。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：对于遥远星系，AME不会影响热射电连续谱测量恒星形成率的准确性；但对于近邻星系的高分辨观测，需谨慎处理AME的潜在偏差，建议采用多频观测策略。

title: Jets and Outflows in Young Stellar Objects with the SKAO
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Sabatini01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Jets and outflows are ubiquitous phenomena associated with the formation of young stellar objects (YSOs). They play a crucial role in removing angular momentum from the accreting system and in regulating star-formation efficiency. Theoretical studies and observations with ALMA and VLA have shown that jets and winds may have a crucial role in promoting dust growth in the envelope-disc system and in shaping the physical and chemical properties of the surrounding environment. Despite these significant advances, many fundamental questions remain unanswered regarding the acceleration, collimation, and chemical impact of jets and outflows from YSOs. The SKA-project will overcome the limitations of current mm/cm-facilities by enabling high-angular resolution and high-sensitivity cm-observations, crucial for probing jets/outflows near YSOs. Radio recombination lines, combined with proper motions, offer a unique opportunity to study the 3D-kinematics of jets. Non-thermal linearly polarised synchrotron emission will allow measuring magnetic field strength and morphology at unprecedented scales of a few au. Observations of dust emission in outflow cavities will allow studying how dust grows and is eventually transported from the disc to the envelope and back. Finally, the SKA-project will allow exploring the dust composition and chemical enrichment in shocks, where sputtering/shattering of grains cause the release of their mantles and refractory cores in the gas-phase. Complementary to ALMA's detection of simple and complex organic molecules, the SKAO will probe, for the first time, long carbon chains/rings, several Cl-, Al-, Mg-, and other metal-bearing species (missed by current sub-mm facilities).

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了SKA项目将如何克服当前毫米/厘米设施的局限，通过高分辨率和高灵敏度观测，深入研究年轻恒星天体（YSOs）的喷流和外流现象，包括其加速、准直、3D运动学、磁场测量、尘埃生长与传输以及化学富集等关键问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有重大进展，但关于YSOs的喷流和外流的加速、准直及化学影响等基本问题仍未解答。SKA项目旨在克服当前设施的局限，提供更高分辨率和灵敏度的观测能力。
AI.method: 利用SKA项目进行高角分辨率和高灵敏度的厘米波段观测；通过射电复合线和自行运动研究喷流的3D运动学；利用非热线性偏振同步辐射测量磁场的强度和形态；观测外流腔中的尘埃发射以研究尘埃生长和传输；探测激波中的尘埃成分和化学富集，以及长碳链、环状结构和金属物质。
AI.result: SKA项目将能够以前所未有的尺度（数天文单位）测量磁场强度和形态；首次探测长碳链/环以及多种含Cl、Al、Mg和其他金属的物质；结合ALMA对有机分子的探测，全面揭示喷流和外流对周围环境的物理化学影响。
AI.conclusion: SKA项目将显著推进我们对YSOs喷流和外流的理解，特别是在动力学、磁场、尘埃处理和化学富集等方面，是当前ALMA等设施的重要补充。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 喷流和外流是与年轻恒星天体（YSOs）形成相关的普遍现象。它们在移除吸积系统的角动量以及调节恒星形成效率中起着关键作用。理论研究和ALMA及VLA的观测表明，喷流和风可能在促进包层-盘系统中的尘埃生长以及塑造周围环境的物理和化学性质方面具有关键作用。尽管取得了这些显著进展，但关于YSOs喷流和外流的加速、准直以及化学影响，许多基本问题仍未得到解答。SKA项目将克服当前毫米/厘米设施的局限性，实现高角分辨率和高灵敏度的厘米波段观测，这对于探测YSOs附近的喷流/外流至关重要。射电复合线与自行运动相结合，为研究喷流的3D运动学提供了独特的机会。非热线性偏振同步辐射将允许在仅几天文单位的空前尺度上测量磁场强度和形态。对流出腔中尘埃发射的观测将有助于研究尘埃如何生长并最终从盘输送到包层再返回。最后，SKA项目将允许探索激波中的尘埃组成和化学富集，其中颗粒的溅射/破碎导致其包层和难熔核心释放到气相中。作为ALMA检测简单和复杂有机分子的补充，SKAO将首次探测长碳链/环、几种含Cl、Al、Mg及其他金属的物种（当前亚毫米设施所遗漏的）。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结，SKA项目将显著推进我们对YSOs喷流和外流的理解，特别是在动力学、磁场、尘埃处理和化学富集等方面，是当前ALMA等设施的重要补充。

title: A Statistical Study of HI Gas in AGN-Hosting and Satellite Galaxies from ALFALFA and FASHI
comment: 28 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication in RAA
summary: We investigate the relative importance of Active Galactic Nucleus (AGN) feedback and environmental processes using a large sample of HI galaxies from the ALFALFA and FASHI surveys. By applying the optical spectroscopy from SDSS DR7/DR8 and the DESI survey, we analyse the gas content and physical properties of AGN-hosting galaxies in group environments. Our results show that AGN-hosting galaxies exhibit significantly suppressed star formation rates and HI gas fraction, approximately one order of magnitude lower than star-forming counterparts, regardless of their group-centric position. AGN-hosting satellites exhibit a significant and persistent deficit in both gas fraction and SFR relative to normal satellites without AGN, even at the halo virial radius (R/R180 approx 1). This suggests that cold gas depletion is primarily driven by internal AGN feedback before these galaxies experience intense environmental interactions. The relatively flat radial profiles of gas fraction and sSFR further indicate that the evolution of AGN-hosting satellites is governed by internal physical processes rather than environmental interactions. Moreover, the apparent increase in HI gas at R/R180 < 0.3 is identified as an artifact of beam confusion. We conclude that for the AGN-hosting population, internal feedback is likely the prior quenching mechanism, while environmental effects act as a secondary, subsequent process.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现，在星系群环境中，活跃星系核反馈是导致星系冷气体耗尽和恒星形成抑制的首要机制，其作用远超环境效应。AGN宿主星系的HI气体分数和恒星形成率比正常星系低约一个数量级，且该效应在星系群外围仍然显著，环境过程仅作为次要的后续机制。
AI.motivation: 探究在星系群环境中，AGN反馈与环境过程（如冲压剥离、潮汐作用）对星系气体含量和恒星形成活动的相对重要性。
AI.method: 利用ALFALFA和FASHI巡天的大样本HI星系数据，结合SDSS DR7/DR8和DESI的光学光谱，分析星系群中AGN宿主星系的气体含量和物理性质。
AI.result: AGN宿主星系的恒星形成率和HI气体分数比恒星形成星系低约一个数量级；AGN宿主卫星星系即使在群晕半径处仍表现出显著的气体和SFR亏缺；气体分数和比恒星形成率的径向轮廓较平坦；R/R180<0.3处HI气体的增加被证实为射电波束混淆的伪像。
AI.conclusion: 对于AGN宿主星系群体，内部AGN反馈是优先的淬灭机制，而环境效应仅作为次要的后续过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用ALFALFA和FASHI巡天中的大样本HI星系，研究了活动星系核反馈和环境过程的相对重要性。通过应用SDSS DR7/DR8和DESI巡天的光学光谱，我们分析了群环境中AGN宿主星系的气体含量和物理性质。我们的结果表明，无论其群中心位置如何，AGN宿主星系都表现出显著抑制的恒星形成率和HI气体分数，比恒星形成对应体低约一个数量级。与没有AGN的正常卫星星系相比，AGN宿主卫星星系即使在暗晕维里半径（R/R180 ≈ 1）处也表现出显著且持续的气体分数和SFR亏损。这表明冷气体消耗主要是由内部AGN反馈驱动的，发生在这些星系经历强烈的环境相互作用之前。气体分数和sSFR相对平坦的径向分布进一步表明，AGN宿主卫星星系的演化受内部物理过程而非环境相互作用支配。此外，在R/R180 < 0.3处观测到的HI气体表观增加被识别为波束混淆的假象。我们得出结论，对于AGN宿主星系群体，内部反馈可能是优先的淬灭机制，而环境效应则作为次要的后续过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 对于AGN宿主星系群体，内部AGN反馈是优先的淬灭机制，而环境效应仅作为次要的后续过程。

title: Bridging Theory and Observation in the SKA Era: A Cosmological Polarized Radiative Transfer Framework for Point-to-Point Polarized Sky Comparisons
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Chan01
summary:
Realizing the full scientific potential of the SKA requires not only revolutionary instrumentation but also accurate modeling of light propagation in an evolving, expanding Universe, in order to translate intensity and polarization data into physical insight about magnetic fields and cosmic plasma. When all-sky cosmological polarized radiative transfer (CPRT) calculations meets SKA observations, theory and data interlock to deliver a predictive, and testable picture of the evolving magneto-ionic Universe. This synergy transforms polarization observations -- assembled into empirical maps of diffuse emission and rotation-measure (RM) grids of discrete sources -- from descriptive data products into powerful astrophysical probes, advancing our understanding of cosmic magnetism across space and time.
  The CPRT formalism -- derived from fundamental conservation laws and incorporating relativistic, cosmological, and full radiative-transfer effects -- provides a robust platform and a common framework for observers, theorists, and simulation experts to pursue shared scientific goals. Observers gain synthetic templates to interpret RM grids and polarization maps; theorists can directly confront models of magnetogenesis and magnetic-field evolution with data; and simulation experts obtain a post-processing tool to transform cosmological magneto-hydrodynamic (MHD) outputs into observable skies. Furthermore, CPRT serves as a powerful testbed when traditional RM-based methods reach their limitations -- for example, in interpreting complex Faraday spectra, disentangling multiple intervening magnetized media, or achieving a coherent picture when diverse observational diagnostics -- such as dispersion measure, synchrotron emission and spectral index, and dust polarization -- are combined.

AI.tldr: 本文提出宇宙学偏振辐射传输（CPRT）框架，用于将SKA观测数据与理论模型结合，以研究宇宙磁场的演化。
AI.motivation: 充分发挥SKA的科学潜力，需要精确的宇宙学光传播模型，将强度与偏振数据转化为对磁场和宇宙等离子体的物理理解。

artifacts.abstract_zh:
实现SKA的全部科学潜力不仅需要革命性的仪器，还需要对演化膨胀宇宙中光传播的精确建模，以便将强度和偏振数据转化为关于磁场和宇宙等离子体的物理洞察。当全天宇宙学偏振辐射传输（CPRT）计算与SKA观测相遇时，理论与数据相互锁定，提供了一幅关于演化磁电离宇宙的可预测且可检验的图景。这种协同作用将偏振观测——汇编成弥散辐射的经验图谱和离散源的旋转测量（RM）网格——从描述性数据产品转变为强大的天体物理探针，从而增进我们对跨越空间和时间的宇宙磁性的理解。
CPRT形式体系——源自基本守恒定律，并纳入相对论、宇宙学和完整辐射传输效应——为观测者、理论家和模拟专家提供了一个稳健的平台和通用框架，以追求共同的科学目标。观测者获得合成模板来解释RM网格和偏振图；理论家可以直接用数据来检验磁起源和磁场演化的模型；模拟专家则获得一个后处理工具，将宇宙学磁流体动力学（MHD）输出转化为可观测的天空。此外，当传统的基于RM的方法达到其局限性时——例如，在解释复杂的法拉第谱、解开多个介入磁化介质，或结合多种观测诊断（如色散测量、同步辐射及其谱指数、尘埃偏振）以获得连贯图景时——CPRT可作为一个强大的测试平台。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：CPRT在传统RM方法受限时（如复杂法拉第谱、多中介介质解耦、多观测诊断联合）可作为强大测试平台，推动宇宙磁场研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: An illustration of an all-sky CPRT framework employing a ray-tracing method. The CPRT equation is solved along each light ray (shown in red), which is labelled by three parameters: the cosmological redshift \(z\) , which links to the light travelled distance (or time) and the position on the celestial sky \((\theta,\phi)\) . The observer is located at the center ( \(z=0\) ). .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：全天CPRT框架采用光线追踪方法的示意图。CPRT方程沿每条光线（以红色显示）求解，该光线由三个参数标记：宇宙学红移\(z\)，它关联到光传播的距离（或时间）以及在天球上的位置\((\theta,\phi)\)。观测者位于中心（\(z=0\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of CPRT data products for various astrophysical studies. Column (i) shows the redshift evolution of \(I\) (intensity), \(Q\) and \(U\) (linear polarization), and \(V\) (circular polarization) along a ray propagating through highly rarefied intergalactic space. The rapid variations in polarization at \(z\lesssim 0.8\) arise from Faraday rotation and conversion as the ray encounters increasingly magnetized and denser structures at lower redshift. Column (ii) presents pencil-beam maps of the degree of linear polarization and the change in polarization angle for a simulated galaxy cluster, showing spatial variations driven by the underlying magneto-ionic structures. Column (iii) displays the all-sky linear polarization predicted by a magnetic universe model, demonstrating CPRT’s ability to connect local plasma processes with global observable signatures. A higher-resolution version of these figures and further details of the underlying model can be found in Chan et al. ( 2019 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于各种天体物理研究的CPRT数据产品示例。第(i)列显示了沿一条穿过高度稀薄星系际空间的光线的\(I\)（强度）、\(Q\)和\(U\)（线偏振）以及\(V\)（圆偏振）的红移演化。在\(z\lesssim 0.8\)处偏振的快速变化源于光线在较低红移处遇到越来越磁化和致密的结构时产生的法拉第旋转和转换。第(ii)列展示了模拟星系团的线偏振度和偏振角变化的铅笔束图，显示了由底层磁电离结构驱动的空间变化。第(iii)列显示了由宇宙磁场模型预测的全天线偏振，展示了CPRT将局部等离子体过程与全球可观测特征联系起来的能力。这些图的更高分辨率版本以及底层模型的更多细节可在Chan等人（2019）中找到。

title: Radio emission from ultra-diffuse galaxies residing in galaxy clusters
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/Lal01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary:
Ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs), defined by their extremely low surface brightness ($g$-band $μ\gtrsim 24$ mag arcsec$^{-2}$) and large effective radii (3--10 arcsec), remain one of the most puzzling galaxy populations in the nearby Universe \citep{vanDokkum2015}. Predominantly found in dense environments, UDGs in the Coma cluster show a preferential alignment of their major axes toward the cluster centre, suggesting strong environmental influence on their formation and evolution. Using high-sensitivity, low-frequency radio data from the upgraded Giant Metrewave Radio Telescope (GMRT), a pathfinder instrument we examined all 854 UDGs cataloged in Coma cluster \citep{Yagi2016}. Despite the unprecedented depth of these observations, no individual detections were made. A median stacking analysis in the upgraded GMRT band-3 achieved a 5 $\times$ \textsc{rms} upper limit $\simeq$1.5~$μ$Jy, providing the most stringent constraint yet on the average (mean) radio emission from UDGs, corresponding to star-formation rates $\lesssim$10$^{-3}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ for Coma-cluster-like systems and $\lesssim$10$^{-1}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ at $z \sim 0.05$.
  Looking ahead, the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) will transform the study of such faint galaxies. While the early AA$^\star$ configuration will deliver sensitivities comparable to the upgraded GMRT, the AA4 design baseline will achieve sub-$μ$Jy \textsc{rms} levels at matched frequencies ($ν\sim 200$~MHz--1.4~GHz), enabling detections of UDGs with star formation rates as low as 10$^{-4}$--10$^{-3}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ within Virgo and Coma distances. Such capabilities will allow robust discrimination between quenched, dark-matter-dominated systems and those sustaining weak residual star formation or low-luminosity nuclear activity.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用升级版GMRT对Coma星团中854个超弥散星系（UDGs）进行观测，未发现单个探测，通过叠加分析得到平均射电辐射上限（5σ RMS约为1.5μJy），对应恒星形成率<10⁻³ M☉/yr。未来SKA将能探测到更低恒星形成率（10⁻⁴–10⁻³ M☉/yr）的UDGs。
AI.motivation: 超弥散星系（UDGs）是近邻宇宙中最令人困惑的星系种群之一，主要分布在致密环境中，Coma星团中的UDGs显示其主轴倾向于指向星团中心，表明环境对其形成和演化有强烈影响，但目前对其射电辐射特性了解有限。
AI.method: 使用升级版GMRT的低频射电数据，对Yagi等人（2016）编录的Coma星团中854个UDGs进行观测，未发现单个探测，随后进行中值叠加分析。
AI.result: 在升级版GMRT band-3中，通过中值叠加分析得到5×RMS上限约为1.5μJy，这是目前对UDGs平均射电辐射最严格的约束，对应Coma星团类似系统的恒星形成率<10⁻³ M☉/yr，z~0.05处<10⁻¹ M☉/yr。
AI.conclusion: 当前GMRT观测对UDGs的射电辐射给出了严格上限；未来SKA（尤其是AA4设计基线）将在匹配频率（~200 MHz–1.4 GHz）实现亚μJy RMS灵敏度，能够探测Virgo和Coma距离处恒星形成率低至10⁻⁴–10⁻³ M☉/yr的UDGs，从而有效区分淬灭、暗物质主导系统与维持微弱恒星形成或低光度核活动的系统。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究Coma星团中超弥散星系（UDGs）的射电辐射，主题为近邻星系群的环境效应和射电观测，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）几乎没有重叠。论文不涉及强引力透镜，不涉及高红移（z~0.05为近邻），不涉及星系动力学或运动学，不涉及偏振或多相气体。用户核心作者（如daizhong liu、reinhard genzel等）均未出现。方法为射电连续谱叠加，与用户常用的透镜、IFU、分子气体观测等方法无关。因此相关性极低。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超弥散星系（UDGs）以其极低的表面亮度（g波段μ≳24 mag arcsec⁻²）和较大的有效半径（3–10角秒）为特征，是近邻宇宙中最令人困惑的星系种群之一。它们主要存在于密集环境中，后发星系团中的UDGs显示出其主轴优先朝向星系团中心排列的趋势，这表明环境对其形成和演化有强烈影响。利用升级后的巨米波射电望远镜（GMRT，一台探路者仪器）的高灵敏度低频射电数据，我们检查了后发星系团中编录的所有854个UDGs。尽管这些观测具有前所未有的深度，但未发现单个探测。在升级后的GMRT波段3中进行的中值叠加分析达到了5×RMS上限≈1.5 μJy，为UDGs的平均（均值）射电辐射提供了迄今最严格的约束，对应于后发星系团类似系统的恒星形成率≲10⁻³ M☉ yr⁻¹，以及在z∼0.05处≲10⁻¹ M☉ yr⁻¹。展望未来，平方公里阵列（SKA）将彻底改变这类暗弱星系的研究。虽然早期的AA⋆配置将提供与升级后GMRT相当的灵敏度，但AA4设计基线将在匹配频率（ν∼200 MHz–1.4 GHz）下达到亚μJy RMS水平，从而能够在室女座和后发座距离处探测到恒星形成率低至10⁻⁴–10⁻³ M☉ yr⁻¹的UDGs。这种能力将允许在淬灭的、暗物质主导的系统与维持微弱残余恒星形成或低光度核活动的系统之间进行可靠的区分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：当前GMRT观测对UDGs的射电辐射给出了严格上限；未来SKA（尤其是AA4设计基线）将在匹配频率（~200 MHz–1.4 GHz）实现亚μJy RMS灵敏度，能够探测Virgo和Coma距离处恒星形成率低至10⁻⁴–10⁻³ M☉ yr⁻¹的UDGs，从而有效区分淬灭、暗物质主导系统与维持微弱恒星形成或低光度核活动的系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Mosaic image of three pointings in the upgraded GMRT band-3 (250-–500 MHz) at an angular resolution of \(\sim\) 6.5 ′′ . UDG positions from from Yagi et al. ( 2016 ) are marked by the “ \(\circ\) ” sign. The gray-scale image is displayed in logarithmic scales to emphasize the extended, low-surface brightness diffuse radio emission, and the names of key sources are labeled. The rms noise is relatively uniform between 21 \(\mu\) Jy beam -1 and 31 \(\mu\) Jy beam -1 , apart from small regions near bright sources, e.g., Coma A where the rms noise increases. Eight circles correspond to the eight pointings in the 550–850 MHz band of upgraded GMRT. Note the starry-pattern artifact centered on Coma A, limiting the dynamic range.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：升级后GMRT波段3（250–500 MHz）在角分辨率约为6.5角秒下的三个指向的拼接图像。来自Yagi等人（2016）的UDG位置用“○”符号标记。灰度图像以对数尺度显示，以突出延展的低表面亮度弥散射电辐射，并标注了关键源的名称。RMS噪声在21 μJy束⁻¹和31 μJy束⁻¹之间相对均匀，除了靠近亮源的小区域，例如后发座A处RMS噪声增加。八个圆圈对应于升级后GMRT的550–850 MHz波段中的八个指向。注意以后发座A为中心的星状伪影，限制了动态范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Result of constructing a mean (left panel) and a median (right panel) stack of the 675 and 736, respectively source positions in the UDG catalog. The image displays a 50 ′′ \(\times\) 50 ′′ color-scale image (pixel size = 0.8 ′′ ). The flux densities from the stacked images are consistent with the expected noise reduction ( \(\approx N^{-1/2}\) ), where \(N\) is the number of images in the stack, confirming that the results are dominated by Gaussian noise rather than faint unresolved sources.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：分别对UDG星表中的675个和736个源位置构建均值（左图）和中值（右图）叠加的结果。图像显示为50角秒×50角秒的彩色尺度图像（像素大小=0.8角秒）。叠加图像的流量密度与预期的噪声降低（≈N^{-1/2}，其中N是叠加中的图像数量）一致，证实结果由高斯噪声主导，而非暗弱未分辨源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The estimates of 5 \(\sigma\) detection limits and star-formation rate sensitivities for SKA AA4 and AA ⋆ configurations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：SKA AA4和AA⋆配置的5σ探测极限和恒星形成率灵敏度的估计。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of possible causes for extremely weak or undetected radio emission from galaxies at the faint end of the luminosity function, including UDGs and low-luminosity active galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系在光度函数暗弱端（包括UDGs和低光度活动星系）射电辐射极弱或未被探测的可能原因总结。
